【已有两本百万字完结精品】
【简介无力，详情请看正书】
都市三好青年陆九渊在回家路上被一辆大货车给创飞了，在濒死之际顺利绑定系统穿越。
只是在穿越的途中受到神秘力量的干预，陆九渊原本应该穿越到低级世界一个不小心穿越到了高武世界。
强者可翻江倒海，只手灭日月星辰，而更加不幸的是陆九渊是一个毫无背景的凡人，系统更是崩坏掉了。
不过在系统崩坏之前还给陆九渊留下来了三大神级属性。
【帅哥运气好：身为顶级帅哥的你运气要比整个世界的人都要好】
【顶级背景：在遇到背景比你深厚的敌人之后，你将会获得比对方更加恐怖的背景】
【悟性超凡：你的悟性好比其他人好得多了，通常能领悟到别人领悟不到的东西】
。。。。。。
圣地圣子：我都是圣地圣子了，没有想到陆兄的背景居然是天帝后人。
古帝家族：陆小友果然是一副人中龙凤的模样，可否与我家族圣女结为伴侣。
某个气运之子：请不要拿我的气运和陆兄比，在陆兄面前我就是一个普普通通的人而已。
数万年之后，陆九渊立于诸天之上，傲然地看向了众人。
“本少主呀，最喜欢跟别人拼背景了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o547c12c8347baabc4867973f5b3d40f4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大帝尊","author_id":"","book_id":"7237685788366867495","book_name":"这年头，谁还没几个仙帝老祖了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5800人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":513,"name":"高武世界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=513&name=高武世界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7238273716625343028","read_count":"5800","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"711923"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count
